1: this person is a revolutionary at heart; it is difficult for them to build stable relationships or stay with one pursuit for long. They are quick to take action, yet they are already able to rein in their revolutionary impulse (when they choose to).
2: this person is quick to take action and quite comfortable to be around; they can curb their fervor and reshape everything surrounding them.
3: this person swings between utter chaos and orderliness, forming a host of habits and just as easily letting them go, only to return to them again after a while. They can spark many habits and attachments, creating stability, yet they can also abandon them without any visible reason; after a time, a person who is unstable in their habits may revive forgotten attachments anew. All of this happens unexpectedly.
4: very stable people in their habits and attachments. They can be rather fussy about everyday matters, since they have an opinion about everything, and any change is stressful for them. They surround themselves with various attachments and habits, building a stable environment. They can be a little tiresome in their attachments. Change comes to them with great difficulty.
5: very stable people in their habits and attachments. They can be rather fussy about everyday matters, since they have an opinion about everything, and any change is stressful for them. They surround themselves with various attachments and habits, building a stable environment. They can be a little tiresome in their attachments. Change comes to them with great difficulty.
6: a critical overload that fully mirrors the combination of three digits, only markedly stronger. The person strives to surround themselves with an abundance of habits, only to begin cancelling them out, because they start to get in the way. One could say they are wrestling with their own stability. An overload of habits, so many that they may end up living in chaos.

нет: this person is a revolutionary at heart; it is difficult for them to build stable relationships or stay with one pursuit for long. They are quick to take action, yet they are already able to rein in their revolutionary impulse (when they choose to).
